title: lycium pallidum var. normale
intro: Lycium pallidum var. normale, also known as Chinese boxthorn or Chinese desert-thorn, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the family Solanaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects, making it useful in traditional Chinese medicine for treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Lycium pallidum var. normale include improving vision, reducing oxidative stress, and enhancing immune function, as well as its potential anti-cancer and anti-aging effects. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, tinctures, or capsules, and are often used to support eye health, reduce inflammation, and promote overall well-being.
